# aikido_zen_app_blocking (Resource)

Manages the blocking mode of a Zen app in Aikido Security.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aikido_zen_app_blocking" "api" {
  app_id                     = aikido_zen_app.api.id
  block                      = true
  disable_minimum_wait_check = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app_id` (String) The ID of the Zen app.
- `block` (Boolean) Whether to enable blocking mode.

### Optional

- `disable_minimum_wait_check` (Boolean) Skip the 3-day minimum wait period for production apps. Defaults to `false`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The Zen app ID.
